case_title: DAYNIN GORDON VS. ALAN WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-18-2017 CONTINUED TO DEC-20-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-20-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CHARLES E HILL III, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-30-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
